title: chore(deps): bump fastify from 5.6.0 to 5.7.3 in /observability/_examples/otel-bridge/agent-hub

similarOrDuplicatePRs: #12602 - chore(deps-dev): bump fastify from 5.6.2 to 5.7.3 (root devDeps)
#12603 - chore(deps): bump fastify from 5.6.2 to 5.7.3 in /examples/server-fastify-adapter

summary: Dependabot bumps fastify from 5.6.0 to 5.7.3 in the observability otel-bridge agent-hub example. v5.7.3 is a security release fixing CVE-2026-25224 (GHSA-mrq3-vjjr-p77c). Changes are limited to package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml in the examples directory. Transitive dependency updates include pino 9.11.0 -> 10.3.0 and fast-json-stringify 6.1.1 -> 6.2.0.
maintainerNotes: Security fix (CVE-2026-25224) — should be prioritized. CI failures (Agent Builder, Core, Observability, Full Test Suite) appear to be pre-existing/flaky since this PR only modifies an example's lockfile. Two related dependabot PRs (#12602, #12603) bump fastify in other locations and should be merged together. No changeset is needed since this is an examples-only change. The PR was recently rebased (last update ~1 day ago) so it's current with main.
